_comment: Selects which key of the OHBM2026_UI_DATA_PACKAGE_URLS GitHub Actions variable supplies this branch's parquet URLs (see .github/scripts/resolve-data-channel.sh). Spec 023 (atlas-research-dimensions): this branch points at 'r2-023dims' — the same coherent 019lodsem atlas bundle (neuroscape/atlas/neuroscape_vectors UNCHANGED) but with a NEW ohbm2026.parquet that carries the four research-classification dimensions (focus / research_modality / theory_scope / epistemic_basis) in each abstract's facets block. Uploaded to Cloudflare R2 via `ohbmcli upload-atlas-package` (ohbm2026 sha256=dd1a1a8d88f7f505128733bf789c6a3fa4f48ed62e546bebfab2453587b0149f). The ohbm2026 corpus_state_key is unchanged (1ba5a9ea1efe) so atlas.parquet's sibling-drift check still matches (neuroscape=27f8f139b296) — atlas-root shows no drift banner. CUTOVER CAVEAT: data-channel.json travels with the branch — merging this to main switches sandbox (and prod, if labeled) to this R2 channel. The prior base branch already pointed at an R2 channel (r2-019lodsem), so this is a parquet bump within R2, not a new Dropbox→R2 cutover; revert 'key' to a Dropbox channel (e.g. 'lod-backdrop') before merge if R2 in production is not yet intended.
